answer.text:
Dear Mohamed,


As I explained before, please provide the route detail for marine team to unlock VVD, and then ask Trade to unlock CULVPZU2500034 within 2 hours.

Then, please also delete the OFT within 2 hours after VVD unlocked. Tks~


Joanne Ding / 丁佳莹

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-13417033072

E-mail: joanneding@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com> 









收件人: Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <joanneding@culines.com>; Louis Xia/CUL-CN/CS <louisxia@culines.com>; Kevin Du/CUL-West Asia <kevindu@culines.com>; Darico Dai/CUL-UAE <daricodai@culines.com>; Smitha Vipin/CUL-West Asia <Smithavi
